lightroom-catalog-analyzer.privacyBadgeAria: Privacy guarantee: this tool runs entirely in your browser. Your catalog is never uploaded.

desktop.headline: Analyze your Lightroom Classic catalog
desktop.subhead: Gear, focal lengths, aperture habits, ratings, GPS, edit intensity, and more — entirely in your browser. Your catalog never leaves your device.
desktop.explainer: Pick a .lrcat file from your computer. We open it in a SQLite WebAssembly worker, compute aggregate statistics, and render an interactive dashboard. Nothing is uploaded.

mobile.headline: This one needs a desktop
mobile.body: The Lightroom Catalog Analyzer needs your Lightroom Classic catalog file (.lrcat), which lives on your computer — not your phone.
mobile.openOnDesktop: Open this page on your computer to analyze your own catalog.

filePicker.dropPrompt: Drop your .lrcat file here, or click to browse
filePicker.errorNotLrcat: That file does not look like a Lightroom Classic catalog (.lrcat).
filePicker.errorReadFailed: Could not read that file. Try again.
filePicker.errorLocked: Couldn't read the catalog — your computer blocked access to the file. The reliable fix: copy the .lrcat file to your Desktop and upload the copy. This also resolves catalogs still open in Lightroom or stored only in the cloud (iCloud, Dropbox, OneDrive).
filePicker.errorEmpty: This file looks empty or hasn't finished downloading. If it's stored in iCloud or Dropbox, let it finish downloading, then try again.

largeFileWarning.title: Large catalog — heads up
largeFileWarning.body: {fileName} is {sizeGb} GB. Parsing may take 30 seconds or more and use a lot of memory. Continue?

parseProgress.title: Analyzing your catalog
parseProgress.subtitle: This runs entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

cacheBadge.label: Loaded from cache
cacheBadge.reanalyzeAria: Discard the cached result and parse this catalog again from the original file.

errors.title: We couldn't analyze that catalog
errors.parseFailed: We couldn't parse that catalog. It may be open in Lightroom, partially written, or in an unexpected format.
errors.workerFailed: The analysis engine failed to start. Reload the page and try again.
errors.schemaTooNew: This catalog was created by a newer version of Lightroom Classic than this tool supports yet.
errors.schemaTooOld: This catalog was created by a version of Lightroom Classic that is too old for this tool.
errors.tooLarge: This catalog is too large to analyze in the browser.
errors.corrupt: This catalog appears to be corrupt or incomplete and could not be read.
errors.notLightroom: That file is not a Lightroom Classic catalog database.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong while analyzing that catalog. Please try again.

dashboard.footerNote: Computed in your browser from your local catalog file. Nothing has been uploaded.

year-in-review.title: Year in Review
year-in-review.callout: Your most prolific month was {month} ({count} photos). Top lens that month: {lens}.
year-in-review.empty: No year-in-review data for this catalog yet.
year-in-review.caption: Headline stats and mini-charts for {year}: {totalPhotos} photos across {daysShot} days, top body {topBody}, top lens {topLens}.

year-to-year.title: Year-to-Year
year-to-year.empty: Need at least 2 full years of catalog data for year-to-year comparison.
year-to-year.caption: Side-by-side annual stats with delta vs prior year for {n} years.

overview.title: Overview
overview.caption: Catalog overview: {totalPhotos} photos across {daysShot} days, {bodyCount} bodies, {lensCount} lenses.

gear.title: Gear
gear.caption: Gear breakdown: top lens {topLens} with {topLensCount} photos; {comboCount} top combos shown.

focal-length.title: Focal Length
focal-length.onePrime: A {mm}mm prime would cover {pct}% of your shots within ±25%.
focal-length.noPrime: Your focal-length use is too spread out for a single prime to dominate.
focal-length.caption: 1mm-bin histogram from {min}mm to {max}mm; {peakCount} top peaks labelled.

focal-length-per-zoom.title: Focal Length per Zoom
focal-length-per-zoom.callout: On your {lens}, {pct}% of shots are at {mm}mm.
focal-length-per-zoom.empty: No zoom lenses detected in this catalog.
focal-length-per-zoom.caption: {n} zoom lens histograms with the dominant focal length highlighted.

apertures.title: Aperture Sweet Spot
apertures.callout: You shoot the {lens} wide open {pct}% of the time.
apertures.empty: Not enough data — need at least one lens with 100+ photos.
apertures.caption: {n} lens aperture histograms.

time-of-day.title: Time of Day
time-of-day.gpsNote: {pct}% of your catalog has GPS — sun-angle breakdown reflects those photos only.
time-of-day.caption: Photo counts across 24 hours with optional sun-angle breakdown.

gps-map.title: GPS Locations
gps-map.aria: GPS map of catalog photo clusters
gps-map.coverage: {pct}% of your catalog has GPS data ({count} photos).
gps-map.empty: No GPS data found in this catalog.
gps-map.caption: Equirectangular world map with {clusters} aggregated clusters; PII guard drops grid cells with fewer than 5 photos.

curation-funnel.title: Curation Funnel
curation-funnel.caption: Funnel from {total} total photos to {rated4Plus} rated 4+ ({pickRate}% pick rate).

edit-intensity.title: Edit Intensity
edit-intensity.sampled: Estimate based on 5% sample of {n} photos.
edit-intensity.caption: Average edit score across the catalog with monthly trend and per-gear breakdown.

ratings.title: Ratings & Picks
ratings.caption: Rating distribution with {colorLabelCount} color labels and per-gear pick rates.

keywords.title: Keyword Coverage
keywords.caption: Tag coverage stats and top {n} keywords (PII guard: only keywords on 3+ photos).

bursts.title: Burst Detection
bursts.keeperRate: Burst photos earn a 4+ rating {burstRate}% — {delta}% {direction} than single shots ({singleRate}%).
bursts.caption: Burst-length distribution; keeper rate {burstRate}% vs {singleRate}% for single shots.

drilldown.title: Drilldown Explorer
drilldown.description: Filter the dashboard by date, gear, focal length, aperture, ISO, rating, or pick state. Apply changes all at once.

period-comparison.title: Period Comparison
period-comparison.empty: Choose a date range for each period and click Apply.
period-comparison.caption: Side-by-side comparison of two arbitrary date ranges with delta column.

catalog-health.title: Catalog Health
catalog-health.duplicatesDisclaimer: Bracketed sequences may appear here; review before deleting.
catalog-health.actionNote: In Lightroom Classic: Library → Find Missing Photos can resolve broken paths.
catalog-health.caption: Catalog health summary: {missing} missing originals, {duplicates} likely duplicates.

markdown.downloaded: Clipboard unavailable — downloaded the report as a .md file instead.

pdf.error: Couldn't generate the PDF. Try Markdown or Share instead.
pdf.title: Lightroom Catalog Analysis
pdf.localFooter: Your catalog was never uploaded — only these aggregated stats.

focalLength.title: Focal Length
focalLength.onePrime: A {mm}mm prime would cover {pct}% of your shots within ±25%.
focalLength.noPrime: Your focal-length use is too spread out for a single prime to dominate.

apertures.title: Aperture Sweet Spot
apertures.perLens: {lens}: shot wide open {pct}% of the time

timeOfDay.title: Time of Day
timeOfDay.gpsNote: {pct}% of your catalog has GPS — sun-angle breakdown reflects those photos only.

editIntensity.title: Edit Intensity
editIntensity.sampledNote: Estimate based on a sample of the catalog.

bursts.title: Burst Detection
bursts.keeperRate: Burst photos earn a ≥4 rating: {a}% vs {b}% for single shots.

periodComparison.title: Period Comparison
periodComparison.notExported: Period Comparison is interactive in the app and is not exported.

catalogHealth.title: Catalog Health
catalogHealth.actionNote: Lightroom Classic → Library → Find Missing Photos can resolve broken paths.

disclosure.title: Share a link to your analysis
disclosure.uploaded: Counts, top-N lists, and histograms — exactly the data shown above.
disclosure.notUploaded: Filenames, image files, folder paths, GPS coordinates beyond ~5 km grid cells, and keywords used fewer than 3 times.

errors.rate-limited: You've hit the share limit. Try again in an hour.
errors.storage-unavailable: Storage temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
errors.invalid: Couldn't share this analysis — the data looks malformed.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong creating the link. Try again.

recent.title: Your recent shares
recent.subtitle: Links you created on this device. Open one to view it, or delete it to revoke access.

recipient.banner: This is a shared analysis. The original catalog was never uploaded — only these aggregated stats.
recipient.cta: Try the tool with your own catalog
recipient.expiredTitle: This share has expired or was deleted.
recipient.expiredBody: The link may have reached its expiration date, or the creator deleted it.
recipient.schemaNewerBody: This analysis was made with a newer version of the tool. Try refreshing the page.
